recommendations.title: Lone Wolf and Cub: Sword of Vengeance
recommendations.overview: Official Shogunate executioner Ogami Itto has been framed for disloyalty to the Shogunate by the Yagyu clan, against whom he now is waging a one-man war, along with his infant son, Daigoro.

recommendations.title: Lone Wolf and Cub: Baby Cart to Hades
recommendations.overview: Ogami Itto volunteers to be tortured by Yakuza in order to save a prostitute and is hired by their leader to kill an evil chamberlain.

recommendations.title: Lone Wolf and Cub: Baby Cart at the River Styx
recommendations.overview: Ogami Itto battles a group of female ninja in the employ of the Yagyu clan and must eliminate a traitor who plans to sell his clan's secrets to the Shogunate.

recommendations.title: Lone Wolf and Cub: Baby Cart in the Land of Demons
recommendations.overview: Ogami Itto is challenged by a quintet of warriors, each armed with one fifth of Ogami's assassin fee and one fifth of the information he needs to complete his assignment.

recommendations.title: Shogun Assassin
recommendations.overview: A Shogun who grew paranoid as he became senile sent his ninjas to kill his samurai. They failed but did kill the samurai’s wife. The samurai swore to avenge the death of his wife and roams the countryside with his toddler son in search of vengeance.

recommendations.title: Zatoichi
recommendations.overview: Blind traveler Zatoichi is a master swordsman and a masseur with a fondness for gambling on dice games. When he arrives in a village torn apart by warring gangs, he sets out to protect the townspeople.

recommendations.title: Yojimbo
recommendations.overview: A nameless ronin, or samurai with no master, enters a small village in feudal Japan where two rival businessmen are struggling for control of the local gambling trade. Taking the name Sanjuro Kuwabatake, the ronin convinces both silk merchant Tazaemo

recommendations.title: Into the Sun
recommendations.overview: After the assassination of Tokyo's Governor by Yakuza members, the CIA bureau chief for Tokyo puts out a call to an agent that had been raised in Japan and trained by ex-Yakuza. Using his former ties, he quickly determines that a war is brewing betwe

recommendations.title: Sword Master
recommendations.overview: Weary of the bloodshed and violence from the martial arts world, a powerful swordsman banishes himself to the humble life a vagrant, wandering the fringes of society. But his violent past refuses to let him go quietly. The master swordsman must regai

recommendations.title: Only You
recommendations.overview: The passionate love between a former boxer and a beautiful blind woman.
